creator: riggs@f113.hadiko.de
text:
mplayer causes segfaults caused by using decoding routines which do not apply to the used CPU.

Fix: This port update contains a new makefile, so everybody can define the options for the used decoding instruction set.
How-To-Repeat: Building mplayer with support for instruction sets which do not match the implemented set, e.g. use of 3Dnow on an Intel machine.
